title: Admin report of permissions

posts.author: Larryr20 (Larry Rabinowitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I searched the community and didnt find an answer so Ill ask here.
I am looking for a way to give me a report of all my boards and who has been assigned to each one? Over time, we move people from board to board and sometimes they are not cleaned up and removed from the old board. A global overview would save me a ton of time instead of going into each one. Is there such a report?
thanks!
Larry
